translation: From the Kanesh colony to Aššur's dagger, our messenger, and our messenger: I am staying in the City. I am staying in the City.

I am staying in the City. My dear fathers, when they arrive from the City they must not raise claim against us. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

From the merchant to the merchant: Why is it that when the colony comes up to the colony when the colony goes to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to come to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Why is it that the colony refuses to go to the colony? Ennam-Aššur seized us against the customers and the merchant.
